name: LivePerson Conversational Cloud API
what_it_does: Enterprise conversational AI and messaging platform with REST API — enabling brands to manage customer conversations across messaging channels (SMS, WhatsApp, Apple Messages for Business, web chat, in-app) with AI-powered virtual agents, human agent escalation, intent recognition, and deep contact center integrations at enterprise scale.
use_cases: Deploying AI virtual agents across SMS, WhatsApp, and web chat via LivePerson API
Integrating LivePerson with contact center infrastructure for agent-assist AI
Querying conversation analytics and AI containment metrics for support reporting
Managing LivePerson bot configurations and intent models programmatically
Triggering proactive messaging campaigns to customers via LivePerson API
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise support volume (LivePerson serves Fortune 500)
Simple website chat widget (use Intercom or Drift for SMB/mid-market chat)
E-commerce-focused support automation (use Zowie or Gorgias for e-commerce bots)
best_when: A Fortune 500 brand needs enterprise-grade conversational AI across messaging channels (SMS, WhatsApp, Apple Messages) with deep contact center integration and strong AI intent recognition at millions-of-conversations scale.
avoid_when: You're not an enterprise brand, have low support volume, or need simple chat without conversational AI complexity.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows. API key for service integrations. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with role-based access. Webhook for conversation events, messaging events, and AI intent triggers. Conversational Cloud platform (LiveEngage) has multiple API services. SDK for mobile and web chat. Scoped by service (Messaging, Data, Management). SSO via SAML for enterprise.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales; $100K-1M+/year for large deployments
pricing.notes: New York company. Founded 1995. NASDAQ listed (LPSN). $480M+ revenue (2023). Pioneer in enterprise live chat (original LivePerson chat widget). Transformed to Conversational Cloud/AI platform. Customers include T-Mobile, Delta Airlines, HSBC, IBM. Strong in telco, banking, insurance verticals. Voice-to-messaging shift strategy. AI-powered automation reducing human agent volume. CEO restructuring and company downsizing through 2023-2024.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for conversations, messaging, agents, and analytics across multiple service APIs. OAuth2 auth. Good but complex documentation (multiple API services). Multiple API services: Messaging, Data, Management — different endpoints and auth. WhatsApp Business API integration requires Meta BSP account. SDK available for multiple languages. Enterprise onboarding required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Conversation reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period. Message sends not idempotent — use conversation ID + sequence for deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: Multiple API services (Messaging, Data, Management) each with different endpoints and auth
WhatsApp integration requires Meta Business Solution Provider account — separate cost
NASDAQ-listed company in financial restructuring (2023-2024) — evaluate vendor stability
Enterprise onboarding 3-6 months — significant implementation effort before go-live
Apple Messages for Business requires Apple approval — apply months before launch

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS compliant. US, EU, AU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. NASDAQ-listed with public company security standards. Customer conversation data is highly sensitive — enterprise-grade access controls required. HIPAA BAA for healthcare conversations. PCI-DSS for payment-related conversations. Multiple messaging channel data subject to varying privacy regulations by country.
